notes: RE-ASSESSED post-#719+#766+golden-summary surfacing: a single trivial turn lights up model + context occupancy. Antigravity is transcript-first / single-birth — the conv-id session (SessionIDFromPath off the <conv-id> brain dir) is born in ready when agy writes transcript.jsonl, then cycles ready->working->ready over the turn. NO presession proc-row reconcile is modeled (PID binding is best-effort and not load-bearing for this cell). On turn_done the parser's applyDBMetrics (parser.go:180) reads the sibling conversations/<conv>.db and sets ModelName (canonical resolvable id, NOT 'unknown') + Tokens.Total = context-occupancy tokens (gen_metadata field #5), so context_window > 0 (capacity table for the resolved model) and context_utilization_percentage > 0 after the first turn. #766's StageReplayStore captures+serves the store and finalizeSummary (metrics.go:52-59) lifts the store vector into the golden summary, so context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero are verify-checkable. tokens_nonzero is deliberately NOT asserted — it reads cum_input+cum_output (observations.go:37) which antigravity never feeds, so it would hard-fail verify. COST is NOT asserted — antigravity persists no cost (deferred #716). Model left PROVISIONAL — record fills the exact canonical id from the live recording (the store's dash-form, e.g. gemini-3.x-flash), not a doc guess.

text: Conv-id-keyed session appears in ready after the first turn (when agy writes transcript.jsonl). Single-birth: anchored to start, no presession proc-row reconcile.
The trivial prompt drives the session ready -> working on the first transcript activity

The terminal MODEL/PLANNER_RESPONSE (no tool_calls) settles the session back to ready; at this turn_done applyDBMetrics reads the store, so ModelName is the resolved boot model (not 'unknown') and context_utilization_percentage > 0 / context_window > 0 from the db store + capacity table
